title: Training Run Schema
description: A single training run validation result for the idud system

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this training run

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this run was executed

repo_url.description: HTTPS URL of the repository tested

issue_id.description: Unique identifier for the test case (issue or scenario)

issue_text.description: The issue description or problem statement

predicted_files.description: List of file paths predicted by idud to be related to the issue

actual_files.description: List of actual file paths that were changed/relevant (ground truth)

true_positives.description: Number of correctly predicted related files

false_positives.description: Number of incorrectly predicted related files

false_negatives.description: Number of actual files that were not predicted
